title: Visual Communication Design Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Visual Communication Design Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: VERBAL (SÖZEL)

NO SCIENCE EXAM WILL BE TAKEN FOR THE THESIS/NON-THESIS VISUAL COMMUNICATION DESIGN M

In order to apply to the program (thesis), candidates must have taken the ALES exam and must have received at least 55 points from the verbal point type.

-In Master's Programs (Thesis), 65% of the ALES in the relevant score type and 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average will be additioned and placed in the ranking.

-In the calculation of the non-thesis program score, 50% of the Equal Weight point type ALES score and 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average converted to the 100-point system will be taken as a basis.

-The system will automatically assign 55 points for applicants who do not have an ALES score when applying to the non-thesis program.

The applications of the candidates of those who don’t apply online or hadn’t graduate at the time of application, or those who don’t upload the ALES document of the last 5 years for the thesis program and the document showing the undergraduate graduation grade point average to the application system will be deemed invalid.

In this program, classes are held in the evenings on weekdays.

Who Can Apply to the Public Relations and Advertising Master's Program

?

Those who have graduated from any department of communication faculties as well as those who have received a bachelor's degree from any field of social sciences can apply to the Thesis and Non-Thesis Public Relations and Advertising Master's Programs.
